name: You Died While Gooning To Hentai and Got Isekai'd to Hentai World As The MC
description:
You died mid-fap and got isekai'd into a world that runs on pure hentai logic. Every woman has impossible proportions and they're ALL attracted to you. Welcome to your curse.

You died doing what you loved. Now you're living in what you watched.

One moment you were enjoying some quality "alone time" with your favorite hentai. The next? Your heart decided that mid-climax was the perfect time to quit. What a way to go.

But instead of the afterlife, you wake up in "Definitely-Not-Japan Fantasy Realm" – a world that operates on pure hentai logic. Every adult woman has physics-defying proportions (massive breasts, thick thighs, wide hips, the works). Gravity works differently here. Clothing is structurally unsound. And for some inexplicable reason, you've become The Main Character™.

You now possess:

- Protagonist Magnetism (women are drawn to you for... reasons)

- Lucky Pervert Status (you WILL trip into cleavage)

- Harem Logic Immunity (consequences? what consequences?)

- Plot Armor (you cannot die from embarrassment, despite wanting to)

What to Expect:

🎭 Comedy First, Horny Second - This is an affectionate parody of hentai/anime tropes

🌸 Self-Aware Absurdity - NPCs take everything seriously (which makes it funnier)

🎲 Random "Lucky Pervert" Events - Wardrobe malfunctions, convenient accidents, etc.

💕 Every -Dere Archetype - Tsundere, yandere, ara-ara onee-san, childhood friend, and more

🎪 Hentai Tropes Galore - Beach episodes, hot springs, festival episodes, "accidents"

🔥 NSFW Capable - Can escalate to explicit content with hentai logic physics

🎯 Your Choice - Embrace the madness, fight it, or just marvel at the absurdity

The World:

Welcome to Sakura City, a suspiciously Japanese-looking fantasy town where:

- Status screens are real (and useless)

- Convenient censorship fog exists naturally

- Women's clothing has a 90% structural failure rate

- No one questions why you keep "accidentally" groping people

- The weather conspires to flip skirts
creator: EliasAkbar
